titles.en: Chapter on Remembering Allah {swt} and Supplicating During the Journey
Chapter on Remembering Allah {swt} and Supplicating During the Journey

segments: : «كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فِي سَفَرِهِ إِذَا هَبَطَ سَبَّحَ وَ إِذَا صَعِدَ كَبَّرَ ».
arabic.text: : «كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ فِي سَفَرِهِ إِذَا هَبَطَ سَبَّحَ وَ إِذَا صَعِدَ كَبَّرَ ».

segments:
Hadith.2420 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"When the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) was on a journey, he would glorify Allah (swt) (say 'SubhanAllah (swt)') when descending and magnify Allah (swt) (say 'Allahu Akbar') when ascending."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2420 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"When the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) was on a journey, he would glorify Allah (swt) (say 'SubhanAllah (swt)') when descending and magnify Allah (swt) (say 'Allahu Akbar') when ascending."

narratorChain.raw: 2420 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Remembering Allah {swt} and Supplicating During the Journey

segments: : «إِذَا كُنْتَ فِي سَفَرٍ فَقُلِ: اَللَّهُمَّ اِجْعَلْ مَسِيرِي عَبَراً وَ صَمْتِي تَفَكُّراً وَ كَلاَمِي ذِكْراً ».
arabic.text: : «إِذَا كُنْتَ فِي سَفَرٍ فَقُلِ: اَللَّهُمَّ اِجْعَلْ مَسِيرِي عَبَراً وَ صَمْتِي تَفَكُّراً وَ كَلاَمِي ذِكْراً ».

segments:
Hadith.2421 - Al-Ala’ narrated from Abu ‘Ubaydah, from one of the Imams (as), who said:
"When you are on a journey, say: 'O Allah (swt), make my traveling a source of lessons, my silence a form of reflection, and my speech a means of remembrance.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2421 - Al-Ala’ narrated from Abu ‘Ubaydah, from one of the Imams (as), who said:
"When you are on a journey, say: 'O Allah (swt), make my traveling a source of lessons, my silence a form of reflection, and my speech a means of remembrance.'"

narratorChain.raw: 2421 - وَ رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Remembering Allah {swt} and Supplicating During the Journey

segments: 2422 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «وَ اَلَّذِي نَفْسُ أَبِي اَلْقَاسِمِ بِيَدِهِ مَا هَلَّلَ اَللَّهَ مُهَلِّلٌ وَ لاَ كَبَّرَ اَللَّهَ مُكَبِّرٌ عَلَى شَرَفٍ مِنَ اَلْأَشْرَافِ إِلاَّ هَلَّلَ مَا خَلْفَهُ وَ كَبَّرَ مَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ بِتَهْلِيلِهِ وَ تَكْبِيرِهِ حَتَّى يَبْلُغَ مَقْطَعَ اَلتُّرَابِ.
arabic.text: 2422 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «وَ اَلَّذِي نَفْسُ أَبِي اَلْقَاسِمِ بِيَدِهِ مَا هَلَّلَ اَللَّهَ مُهَلِّلٌ وَ لاَ كَبَّرَ اَللَّهَ مُكَبِّرٌ عَلَى شَرَفٍ مِنَ اَلْأَشْرَافِ إِلاَّ هَلَّلَ مَا خَلْفَهُ وَ كَبَّرَ مَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ بِتَهْلِيلِهِ وَ تَكْبِيرِهِ حَتَّى يَبْلُغَ مَقْطَعَ اَلتُّرَابِ.

segments:
Hadith.2422 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"By the One in whose hand is the soul of Abu al-Qasim, whenever someone glorifies Allah (swt) by saying 'La ilaha illa Allah (swt)' or magnifies Allah (swt) by saying 'Allahu Akbar' upon an elevated place, everything behind them glorifies and everything in front of them magnifies with their glorification and magnification, until it reaches the end of the soil."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2422 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"By the One in whose hand is the soul of Abu al-Qasim, whenever someone glorifies Allah (swt) by saying 'La ilaha illa Allah (swt)' or magnifies Allah (swt) by saying 'Allahu Akbar' upon an elevated place, everything behind them glorifies and everything in front of them magnifies with their glorification and magnification, until it reaches the end of the soil."
